name: Quick Graham Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the brown sugar in the cold water.
2. Add the melted shortening and milk to the sugar-water mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the white flour, salt, and baking soda.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the wet mixture.
5. Stir in the graham flour until well combined.
6. Place the dough in a well-oiled bread pan.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 1 hour.
8. Serve hot or at room temperature.
